question_text: A TV has a power rating of 150 W and is left on for 8 hours per day. Electricity costs 25p per kilowatt-hour. Which of the following is closest to the daily cost of running the TV?
explanation: First convert power to kilowatts: 150 W = 0.15 kW. Then calculate energy: E = 0.15 kW × 8 hours = 1.2 kWh per day. Finally, calculate cost: 1.2 kWh × 25p per kWh = 30p. This is a practical application showing why it matters to switch devices off.
